final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic for Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume, designed as a museum collection guide panel.

Style/medium: museum exhibition panel, historical costume reference chart, cultural heritage infographic, archival documentation style, matte paper texture, restrained and professional
Composition: full-page vertical layout, top-to-bottom hierarchical structure, central main subject (full-body figure or garment disassembly), clear visual hierarchy with labeled zones
Subject: traditional Miao/Hmong silver-ornamented festival costume with pleated indigo skirt, embroidered jacket, silver headdress, and layered accessories
Scene/backdrop: warm off-white / rice paper / pale tea-toned paper texture background, subtle aged paper grain, no decorative clutter
Layout structure:
- Top: Chinese main title + subtitle + introductory paragraph
- Left: structural disassembly zone with Chinese callout lines labeling key components (headdress, collar, jacket, belt, skirt, leg wraps, footwear)
- Upper right: material/craft/texture zone showing fabric swatches with captions (indigo-dyed cotton, hand-woven hemp, silver filigree, embroidered silk)
- Middle right: pattern/color/symbolism zone with color swatches, motif samples, and cultural explanations (butterfly mother, geometric mountain patterns, indigo as protection)
- Bottom: dressing sequence flowchart + core characteristics summary
Color palette: muted archival tones—warm off-white paper base, deep indigo as anchor, oxidized silver gray, earth red accents, black ink text
Materials/textures: visible fabric weave patterns, metallic silver surface sheen, embroidered thread texture, matte paper substrate
Text (verbatim): "中国少数民族服饰"
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese characters, clearly legible, properly structured labels; maintain documentary authenticity over decorative appeal; no English or pinyin
Avoid: poster aesthetics, studio photography feel, e-commerce styling, anime illustration, cosplay vibe, random mislabeled parts, illegible text, fake materials, excessive ornamentation, Behance generic infographic style
